name: prompt-optimization
description: Transform a draft prompt, system message, CLAUDE.md, or multi-agent orchestrator into production-grade instructions for Claude Opus 4.7. Runs a phased optimization protocol with mandatory live calibration against Anthropic documentation, plus an orchestrated fan-out mode that deepens landscape research via parallel subagents. Orchestrated-research deliverables lead with an executive summary, run a load-bearing source-validation revisit pass, and ship an always-on devil's-advocate / confirmatory subagent under a verdict-ladder discipline. Invoke by pasting a draft with optimization intent (auto-trigger) or by typing /prompt-optimization. Ships bundled landscape-research + devils-advocate worker agents.
